phrases.intent_en: Ask where to rent a rowboat on the lake
phrases.text_local: Où peut-on louer une barque sur le lac ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo puh-TOHN loo-AY oon BARK soor luh LAK
phrases.cultural_note: Rowboat (barque) hire is available at the Chalet des Îles on the Grand Lac — the main lake in the Bois de Boulogne. It's one of the most romantic activities in Paris and has been popular since the Second Empire when the park was redesigned by Haussmann. Pedalos are also available.

responses.english: The boat rental is at the edge of the Lower Lake.
responses.phonetic: lah loh-kah-SYOHN duh bark eh toh bor doo lak ahn-fay-ree-UHR
responses.local: La location de barques est au bord du Lac Inférieur.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Jardin des Serres d'Auteuil botanical garden is
phrases.text_local: Où se trouvent les serres d'Auteuil ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lay sehr doh-TUH-yuh
phrases.cultural_note: The Jardin des Serres d'Auteuil is a 19th-century botanical garden with magnificent Victorian glasshouses (serres) on the southern edge of the Bois de Boulogne. Admission is free. The greenhouses contain tropical plants, cacti, and an orchid collection. It's a hidden gem visited mainly by locals.

responses.english: The Auteuil greenhouses are in the south of the park, near Porte d'Auteuil.
responses.phonetic: lay sehr doh-TUH-ee sohn oh sood doo bwah, preh duh lah port doh-TUH-ee
responses.local: Les Serres d'Auteuil sont au sud du bois, près de la Porte d'Auteuil.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the cycling paths are
phrases.text_local: Où se trouvent les pistes cyclables dans le bois ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lay PEEST see-KLAB dahn luh BWAH
phrases.cultural_note: The Bois de Boulogne has extensive cycling paths and several Vélib' bicycle rental stations at its entrances. The park is 845 hectares — twice the size of New York's Central Park. A circuit around the lake and through the main avenues is about 12km.

responses.english: The cycling paths run along the main lanes of the park.
responses.phonetic: lay peest see-KLAH-bluh lonzh layz ah-LAY pran-see-PAL doo bwah
responses.local: Les pistes cyclables longent les allées principales du bois.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the entrance to Roland-Garros is from the park
phrases.text_local: Où est l'entrée de Roland-Garros depuis le bois ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh lahn-TRAY duh roh-lahn gah-ROH duh-PWEE luh BWAH
phrases.cultural_note: Roland-Garros (the French Open stadium) is on the southern edge of the Bois de Boulogne, accessible via Avenue Gordon Bennett from inside the park. During the French Open in May-June, walkers and cyclists passing through the park may encounter tournament crowds.

responses.english: The Roland-Garros entrance is on the Porte d'Auteuil side.
responses.phonetic: lan-TRAY duh roh-LAHN gah-ROHS eh doo koh-TAY port doh-TUH-ee
responses.local: L'entrée de Roland-Garros est du côté Porte d'Auteuil.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Fondation Louis Vuitton museum is
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve la Fondation Louis Vuitton dans le bois ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lah fohn-dah-SYOHN lwee VWEE-tohn dahn luh BWAH
phrases.cultural_note: The Fondation Louis Vuitton, designed by Frank Gehry and opened in 2014, is located inside the Bois de Boulogne near the Jardin d'Acclimatation. Its spectacular glass-sail architecture is visible from much of the park. A free shuttle runs from Métro Les Sablons (Line 1).

responses.english: The Fondation Louis Vuitton is in the north of the park, Neuilly side.
responses.phonetic: lah fohn-dah-SYOHN lwee vwee-TOHN eh toh nor doo bwah, koh-TAY nuh-YEE
responses.local: La Fondation Louis Vuitton est au nord du bois, côté Neuilly.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which métro or RER station is at the edge of the park
phrases.text_local: Quelle station de métro ou de RER est près du bois ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel stah-SYOHN duh may-TROH oo duh air-uh-air eh preh doo BWAH
phrases.cultural_note: Multiple entrances correspond to different transport options. Métro Line 1 stops at Les Sablons and Porte Maillot (north side); Line 10 at Michel-Ange–Auteuil and Boulogne–Jean Jaurès (south side). The park is at the western edge of Paris, just inside the Périphérique.

responses.phonetic: lah stah-SYOHN lay sah-BLOHN, soor lah leen-yuh uhn
responses.local: La station Les Sablons, sur la ligne un.
